vulnerablePopulations: rural populations with limited access to pediatric neurology
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ILAE criteria; EEG patterns supportive; syndrome-based classification

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EEG access limited outside cities; many diagnoses are clinical
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Valproate and other ASMs (with pregnancy considerations); counseling on triggers; school and safety guidance
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Treatment gap and limited specialist services
